description_long: This is a single-story, modern ranch-style house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white with some gray and blue accents, and it features a visible garage with a blue vehicle parked outside. The house has multiple large windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The driveway and front yard are paved, and the main entryway is set back, partially sheltered by the roof overhang. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass for the windows and metal or wood for doors and garage elements. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story ranch house with a flat roof, white exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and an attached garage with a blue vehicle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the garage with a blue vehicle and the main house structure extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, main entryway, and the blue vehicle parked in front of the garage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the garage and blue vehicle visible, as well as the rear section of the house.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house, with windows and paved yard area visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a simple door adjacent to the garage.
